title: 🛠️dynatrace create coe subworkflows
guide:
## **🧩dynatrace create coe subworkflows**

⚙️ This workflow provides a simple and automated way to **create all coe subworkflows in your tenant**.

* All created subworkflows are created in the tenant **under the actor user executing the workflow**, so the actor user becomes the **owner and actor** of each created subworkflow.
 
* If a subworkflow already exists, it is **skipped** and not recreated.
 
* Simply run the workflow to create subworkflows in your tenant. 
* User that runs the workflow must have workflow write permissions


---


### 📚 **Subworkflow that will be created**

- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace get all problem data
- 🧩subworkflow - aws get host data of ec2 instance (gen2 aws connector)
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace check if problem is solved or closed
- 🧩subworkflow - aws create cloudformation stack
- 🧩subworkflow - aws update cloudformation stack
- 🧩subworkflow - aws get lambda data (gen 2 aws connector)
- 🧩subworkflow - aws wait for systems manager  document execution
- 🧩subworkflow - openai Text and Prompting
- 🧩subworkflow - aws reboot ec2 instances
- 🧩subworkflow - aws extend ebs volume
- 🧩subworkflow - aws get host data of ec2 instance (gen3 aws connector)
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace ingest custom info event
- 🧩subworkflow - aws s3 block public access for bucket
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace close problem
- 🧩subworkflow - aws resize ec2 instance
- 🧩subworkflow - aws davis forecast for aws volume usage
- 🧩subworkflow - aws disable public access for security group
- 🧩subworkflow - aws close security group
- 🧩subworkflow - aws get process data of process running on ec2 instance
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace create workflow
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace set all workflows of owner to live (deployed)
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace delete workflow
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace create dashboard
- 🧩subworkflow - aws wait for run command execution
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace set all workflows of owner to draft
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace get event data
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace ingest custom alert
- 🧩subworkflow - aws run command on ec2 instance
- 🧩subworkflow - aws delete unused security group
- 🧩subworkflow - aws delete cloudformation stack
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace export one or all workflows to existing github repo
- 🧩subworkflow - dynatrace delete all workflows of owner
- 🧩subworkflow - aws scan for security groups with ports open to 0.0.0.0/0
